blocks.text: Glimt shock Inter at San Siro — Sporting await in the last 16
An astonishing result in Milan gives Bodø/Glimt their biggest European night. The reward: Sporting CP in the next round — and 200,000 new followers watching their journey.
🎿 16:10 — Bø brothers & Lægreid in Men's 20km Individual, Kontiolahti
🏅 20:00 — Paralympic Winter Games 2026 Opening Ceremony, Milano

items: Sat 16:00 — West Ham at Liverpool (PL title race) ★4
